spec.name: The Pit
spec.description: You stand in a section of a pipe that leads to a dead end. In the floor there is a pit leading down. There are bars set in the side of the pit wall functioning as a ladder.

west.description: West. You can see a dimly lit quadruple junction with an exit up.

down.description: Down the pit it is so utterly dark that you can't see a thing.
